name: Gingered Spam Salad
recipeIngredient: Thai bird peppers and Cilantro sprigs to garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a sealed glass or plastic container.
2. Refrigerate at least two hours, or preferably overnight.
3. Stir or shake occasionally to evenly coat the mixture.
4. One hour before serving, stir in cilantro.
5. Serve on a bed of torn lettuce of your choice.
6. Garnish with quartered cherry tomatoes, Thai bird peppers, and cilantro sprigs.
